data.description:
Rec 4 of session-logs/2026-06-09-architecture-review.md (risk R3). applier.py is 3,386 LOC (outbound appliers, inbound appliers, retry machinery, audit views, event IO, five _load_*_module importlib-by-path shims at lines ~87/114/708/730/1823 that exist only because acli-integration.py has a hyphen in its name). Past the size an agent can hold and edit confidently.

Work (split only along call-graph seams that already exist; no files <100 LOC):
- applier.py -> outbound_apply.py / inbound_apply.py / apply_runtime.py (retry, locks, pass-records) / event_io.py (then retired by the shared event-append module ticket). _build_leaves() (~line 1396) is the registry seam.
- Rename acli-integration.py -> rebar_reconciler/acli.py; delete all five importlib shims; split client/field-mapping further only if still >800 LOC.
- Behavior-preserving: existing reconciler unit suites are the gate; no logic edits in the move commits.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No reconciler module >800 LOC (target 200-500); no new module <100 LOC
- [ ] Zero importlib-by-path loads of acli code remain
- [ ] Move-only commits; full suite green with no test-logic changes beyond import paths
data.title: Split applier.py along existing seams; rename acli-integration.py to acli.py
